name: Apple-Raisin Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, beat together eggs, sugar, and vanilla for 2-3 minutes until smooth.
3. Gradually stir the egg mixture into the dry ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
7. Cut into squares and serve warm or cold.
